name: Elme Communities
summary: PART I ITEM1: BUSINESS Elme Communities Overview Elme Communities, a Maryland real estate investment trust, formerly known as Washington Real Estate Investment Trust (Elme or the Company), is a self-administered equity real estate investment trust (REIT) within the meaning of Sections 856-860 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, as amended (the Code) and successor to a trust organized in 1960. Our business primarily consists of the ownership of apartment communities in the greater Washington, D...
